chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 268 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.770/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.771/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 M/s Mansoor Husain Maitlo and Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the Petitioners will file a proper application in C.P No.D-274 of 2023, therefore, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI/PS
